sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105259" key="tri/spermon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-σπερμον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, with or without <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατάπλασμα,</foreign> name of a plaster, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.43</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
